comparison_baseline: v36 is compared first against a same-day v35/v21 baseline rerun from 2026-04-25; historical tagged baseline remains the decode payload in submission-v20.
reporting_basis: Official-aligned Modal environment (flashinfer/flashinfer-ci-cu132:20260401-2c675fb, flashinfer-bench GitHub main, cupti-python, use_isolated_runner=True, warmup=10, iter=50, trials=3).

runs.note: Workers=20 full sweep initially produced 53/54 PASSED with one transient PARSE_ERROR; --retry filled the remaining B4 workload for final 54/54 PASSED.
Same-day baseline rerun from the previous HEAD solution completed 54/54 PASSED in one workers=20 full sweep with no retry. It includes one slow B48 outlier at 0.01442 ms.
Environment-update re-eval completed 54/54 PASSED in one full sweep with no retry required.
Main sweep had 1 transient PARSE_ERROR workload; final retained result merged a targeted retry to reach 54/54 PASSED.
This is the current tagged decode payload in `submission-v20`; decode was unchanged from `submission-v19`.

improvement.same_day_paired_result: 28 wins, 5 ties, 21 losses; mean paired improvement 2.07%, median paired improvement 0.21%. Excluding the single slowest baseline outlier leaves a 0.84% avg-latency improvement.
improvement.max_latency_note: max latency moved from 0.012670ms to 0.012760ms (+0.71%); average and p95 still improved.
improvement.note: The stable targeted win comes from the B8 Triton recurrent launch specialization (num_warps=1, num_stages=3) while retaining the existing B16/B48/large-batch vendored CuTe routes.

batch_record_vs_same_day_v35_rerun.batch_size_48: -5.80% avg latency (0.010714ms -> 0.010093ms), 4/7 wins; aggregate is mostly one same-day baseline outlier and is flat without it

dispatch_logic.condition: batch_size <= 8 -> Triton recurrent; batch_size == 16 -> vendored CuTe with num_blocks_per_state=16; batch_size == 48 -> dedicated TILE_V=16 vendored CuTe with num_blocks_per_state=4; otherwise -> vendored CuTe with DEFAULT_NUM_BLOCKS_PER_STATE=8
dispatch_logic.small_batch_path: Triton recurrent decode path (`fla-recurrent`) for batch_size {1, 4, 8}; B8 uses num_warps=1 and num_stages=3 in v36.
dispatch_logic.transition_path: Vendored FlashInfer CuTe pretranspose decode path with B16_NUM_BLOCKS_PER_STATE=16 for batch_size {16}
dispatch_logic.specialized_b48_path: Dedicated vendored FlashInfer CuTe pretranspose decode path with TILE_V_LARGE=16 and num_blocks_per_state=4 for batch_size {48}
dispatch_logic.default_large_batch_path: Vendored FlashInfer CuTe pretranspose decode path with DEFAULT_NUM_BLOCKS_PER_STATE=8 for batch_size {32, 64}

implementation_notes.contest_fastpath_wrapper: kernel_fi_baseline continues to call run_pretranspose_decode_contest_fastpath() directly with the benchmark contract fixed at T=1, FP32 contiguous state, preallocated output, and use_qk_l2norm=False.
implementation_notes.kernel_body_change: v36 keeps the v33 direct-to-global output reduction, the v34 B16 split, and the v35 B48 TILE_V=16 path, then specializes only the B8 Triton recurrent launch to num_warps=1 and num_stages=3.
implementation_notes.b16_highcta_split: B16_NUM_BLOCKS_PER_STATE=16 remains enabled only for batch_size == 16 after repeated positive local gates.
implementation_notes.b48_large_v16_split: The widened TILE_V_LARGE=16 path is enabled only for batch_size == 48 with num_blocks_per_state=4 because full sweeps showed it wins at B48 but regresses B64.
implementation_notes.rationale: The best stable decode result came from controlled shape-aware dispatch, not a global large-batch replacement.
implementation_notes.latest_recheck_note: The 2026-04-25 syhya925666582-profile v36 full sweep completed 54/54 PASSED after one targeted retry; the same-day v35 baseline rerun completed 54/54 PASSED without retry.
implementation_notes.b8_launch_split: B8 same-day paired validation improved mean latency from 0.004147 ms to 0.004050 ms with 7/7 workload wins.

validation.retry_note: Initial workers=20 sweep had one transient PARSE_ERROR on workload 9f238670-9a56-4ab9-94f9-555755f32205; --retry reran that workload and produced final 54/54 PASSED.
validation.single_b8_gate: 7464a1d6-b0dd-4061-b15a-ebdabf47e351 PASSED at 0.00402 ms before the full sweep.
validation.same_day_baseline_rerun_result: 54/54 PASSED in one full sweep with no retry
validation.previous_retry_note: The 2026-04-21 v35 environment-update recheck completed 54/54 PASSED in one full sweep.

environment_alignment.flashinfer_bench_source: GitHub main installed inside the official-aligned image
